ddls:
CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user (hashed for security) */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, administrator) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "research_projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the project */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the research project */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the research project */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the project */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the project */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User who created the project */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_collaborators" (
  "collaborator_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the collaborator */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Project the collaborator is part of */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* User who is the collaborator */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the collaborator (e.g., researcher, data analyst) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("collaborator_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "socioeconomic_data" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the individual */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the individual */,
  "workclass" TEXT /* Employment classification (e.g., Private, Local-gov) */,
  "fnlwgt" INTEGER /* Final weight of the individual for analysis */,
  "education" TEXT /* Highest level of education completed */,
  "education_num" INTEGER /* Numerical equivalent of the education level */,
  "marital_status" TEXT /* Marital status of the individual */,
  "occupation" TEXT /* Occupation of the individual */,
  "relationship" TEXT /* Relationship status of the individual */,
  "race" TEXT /* Race of the individual */,
  "sex" TEXT /* Gender of the individual */,
  "capital_gain" INTEGER /* Income from capital gains */,
  "capital_loss" INTEGER /* Income from capital losses */,
  "hours_per_week" INTEGER /* Hours worked per week */,
  "native_country" TEXT /* Country of origin */,
  "class" TEXT /* Income class (<=50K or >50K) */,
  "income_source" TEXT /* Primary source of income (e.g., employment, investments) */,
  "urbanization_level" TEXT /* Urbanization level (e.g., urban, rural) */,
  "health_insurance" TEXT /* Type of health insurance (e.g., private, public) */,
  "internet_access" INTEGER /* Internet access (yes/no) */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Project the individual is part of */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_quality_issues" (
  "issue_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the issue */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Data the issue is related to */,
  "issue_type" TEXT /* Type of issue (e.g., missing value, inconsistency) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the issue */,
  "resolved" INTEGER /* Whether the issue has been resolved */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("issue_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_cleaning_history" (
  "cleaning_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the cleaning entry */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Data the cleaning entry is related to */,
  "cleaning_date" TEXT /* Date the cleaning was performed */,
  "cleaning_method" TEXT /* Method used for cleaning (e.g., imputation, interpolation) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the cleaning performed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cleaning_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analytical_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the report */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Project the report is related to */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., income distribution, employment trends) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "visualizations" (
  "visualization_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the visualization */,
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Report the visualization is related to */,
  "visualization_type" TEXT /* Type of visualization (e.g., bar chart, scatter plot) */,
  "data" TEXT /* Data used to generate the visualization */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("visualization_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_activity" (
  "activity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the activity */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* User who performed the activity */,
  "activity_date" TEXT /* Date the activity was performed */,
  "activity_type" TEXT /* Type of activity (e.g., login, data upload) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the activity */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("activity_id")
)
